card.name: Boros Standard Bearer
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 red and white Soldier creature token. {4}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Brightsteel Interceptor
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, tap or untap up to one target artifact or creature. Preamble {3}{WU}{WU} ({3}{WU}{WU}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Protect the Precinct
card.text: Choose one — • This spell deals X damage to target attacking or blocking creature, where X is 2 plus the number of creatures you control. • Untap up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: Firemane Protector
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Flying When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Gate Physician
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. Whenever a Gate you control enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Spiretop Courier
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, scry 1 and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Guildpact Faithful
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control. They gain hexproof from monoclored and can't be blocked by monocolored creatures until your next turn.

card.name: Shield of Compassion
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +0/+2 and can block an additional creature.

card.name: Angelic Rebuke
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment or creature with power or toughness 4 or greater. Then if {R} was spent to cast this spell, it deals 3 damage to that permanent's controller.

card.name: Press the Advantage
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Monument to Solidarity
card.text: When this enchantment enters and whenever you cast a white spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control and an awakening counter on this enchantment. As long as Monument to Solidarity has five or more awakening counters on it, it is a 6/6 Angel creature with flying.

card.name: Wall of Fury
card.text: Defender, reach This creature's gets +1/+0 for each attacking creatures. At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gains haste and can attack as though it didn't have defender until end of turn.

card.name: Sanctum of Protection
card.text: Players can't sacrifice nonland permanents to cast spells or activate abilities. Spells and abilities your opponents control can't cause you to sacrifice permanents.

card.name: Aurelia's Judgment
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Destroy all creatures. You gain 1 life for each creature you controlled that was destroyed this way.

card.name: Loyal Warhound
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Another target creature or planeswalker you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Valiant District Protector
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control with power less than or equal to this creature's gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Bounty Claimer
card.text: First strike When this creature enters, exile target nonland permanent with mana value 3 or greater until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Featherscale Drake
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, tap all creatures you don't control and untap all creatures you control.

card.name: Outmatch
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target tapped creature. • Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control. They gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Nephilim's Gift
card.text: Choose one. If you control a multicolored permanent, you may choose two instead. • Create a 2/2 white Spirit creature token with flying. • You draw a card and gain 3 life.

card.name: Express Mandate
card.text: Flash Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Benthic Protector
card.text: Implant {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Defender, hexproof

card.name: Enlighted Freemage
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Raskal Perfumist
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Flying At the beginning of your end step, if you haven't cast a spell from your hand this turn, surveil 1.

card.name: Fin Clade Guardian
card.text: Implant {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Flying, vigilance

card.name: Gate Infiltrator
card.text: Whenever this creature deals damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card. This creature can't be blocked as long as you control a Gate.

card.name: Spliced Guardian
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) {2}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It gains trample until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lyev Skywatch
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return up to one other target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Chains of Submission
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -5/-0 and loses all abilities.

card.name: Reprocess Essence
card.text: Counter target creature or planeswalker spell. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Bereave
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If that spell is monocolored, counter it unless its controller pays {3} instead.

card.name: Void Wave
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. If you've cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand this turn, scry 2.

card.name: Monument to Wisdom
card.text: When this enchantment enters and whenever you cast a blue spell, draw a card and put an awakening counter on this enchantment. As long as Monument to Wisdom has five or more awakening counters on it, it is a 6/6 Sphinx creature with flying.

card.name: Experiment Twenty-Six
card.text: Implant {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever this creature enters or deals combat damage to a player, you may have it become a copy of target creature, except it isn't legendary and has this ability. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Time Bend
card.text: End the current phase. (Exile all spells and abilities from the stack, including this card. If this was cast during the ending phase, the player whose turn it is discards down to their maximum hand size, damage wears off, and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.)

card.name: Synapse Linker
card.text: Other creatures you control have all this creature's abilities except this one.

card.name: Elusive Biomage
card.text: Implant {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) This creature can't be blocked.

card.name: Absorbed Attendant
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 2. {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand. {T}: Add {C}{U}. Spend this mana only to activate an ability.

card.name: Lawmage Familliar
card.text: Flash Flying, vigilance {U}, Sacrifice this creature: Counter target noncreature spell, activated ability, or triggered ability unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Rimescale Drake
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever this creature enters or you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Aethermage's Contempt
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap any number of untapped Gates you control. Copy it for each Gate tapped this way. The owner of target nonland permanent puts it on the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Untwine
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it. Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}.

card.name: Reconsider
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Nephilim's Vision
card.text: Choose one. If you control a multicolored permanent, you may choose two instead. • Exile target creature, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. • Scry 2. Draw a card.

card.name: Fungal Pest
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1.

card.name: Carnarium Acrobat
card.text: Deathtouch Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it, draw a card and lose 1 life. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Jubilent Sewer Cook
card.text: When this creature enters, mill two cards and you gain 2 life. Swarm 2—{3}{B} ({3}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Stage Cleaner
card.text: Flash Flying Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have defending player lose 2 life. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: First District Paragon
card.text: Whenever a Gate you control enters, this creature gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Swarm Broodmother
card.text: Flying Swarm 3—{4}{B}{B} ({4}{B}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create three 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Undercity Cleaner
card.text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card.

card.name: Enraged Hellhound
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) {R}: Target creature you control gains haste until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Eaten From Within
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put X +1/+1 counters on it and you gain X life, where X is twice the number of creatures sacrificed this way.

card.name: Reap
card.text: Choose one — • Target opponent sacrifices a creature. • Target opponent exiles a monocolored creature they control.

card.name: Jagged Edges
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/-1. When enchanted creature dies under your control, draw a card.

card.name: The Show Never Ends
card.text: Choose one — • Create a 2/1 black and red Elemental Dog creature token with menace, haste and "This creature can't block." • Mill two cards. Return up to two creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Regenerative Cocoon
card.text: Enchant land you control When this Aura enters, mill three cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand. If you don't, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Enchanted land has "{1}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors."

card.name: Monument to Depravity
card.text: When this enchantment enters and whenever you cast a black spell, each opponent loses 2 life, you gain 2 life and put an awakening counter on this enchantment. As long as Monument to Depravity has five or more awakening counters on it, it is a 6/6 Demon creature with flying.

card.name: Demon Progeny
card.text: Defender Whenever another creature dies, put an egg counter on this creature. {T}, Remove six egg counters from this creature: Create a 6/6 black Demon creature token with flying. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Skull Clamper Parasite
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, you may exile target creature card from a graveyard. If you do, this creature becomes a copy of that card, except it's an Insect in addition to its other types and has lifelink.

card.name: Gorespawn Demon
card.text: Flying, trample At the beginning of each upkeep, each player draws a card. Whenever a player draws a card, they lose 1 life. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have target player draw seven cards. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Gruesome Spectacle
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies during your turn, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Each opponent sacrifices a creature. • Each opponent loses 3 life. • Draw a card.

card.name: Daughter of Stone Death
card.text: When this creature enters, other creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. {1}{B}, Discard this card: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Swarm 2—{2}{B} ({2}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Ochran Enforcer
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Swarm 1—{B} ({B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Fired-Up Jester
card.text: When this creature enters, discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have it deal damage equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard to target opponent. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Corpse Jeweler
card.text: Whenever another creature you control dies, create a Treasure token. This ability triggers only once during each of your turn. {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Surveil 1. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a token: Draw a card.

card.name: Deceitful Guide
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, sacrifice up to three other creatures. Choose one for each creature sacrificed this way — • Target player discards a card. • Target player draws a card and loses 1 life. • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Smog Predator
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, target creature you don't control gets -X/-X until end if turn, where X is the number of Gates you control.

card.name: Vengeful Hands
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the exiled card's mana value. Exile target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Nephilim's Corruption
card.text: Choose one. If you control a multicolored permanent, you may choose two instead. • Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. • Target player discards two cards.

card.name: Incite Delirium
card.text: Choose one — • Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it or a card from their graveyard. Exile that card. • Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life.

card.name: Boros Phalanx
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to target opponent or planeswalker.

card.name: Sting Elemental
card.text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.) When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target. If a player is dealt damage this way, scry 1.

card.name: Sunblade Captain
card.text: If another creature or planeswalker dealt damage by this creature would die this turn, exile it instead. {1}{W}: This creature gains first strike until end of turn. (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)

card.name: Second District Keeper
card.text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) When this creature enters, if you control two or more Gates, it fights up to one target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Circle Headliner
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and create a Treasure token. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Wheel of Agony
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature. This spell deals 2 damage to any target. If a creature was sacrificed, it deals 3 damage to any target instead and you scry 1.

card.name: Collateral
card.text: Choose one — • This spell deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. • This spell deals 3 damage to target creature.

card.name: Just Strike
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Subjugate
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, target creature can't block this turn and monocolored creatures can't block this turn. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has haste.

card.name: Furious Upheaval
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target creature with defender. • Create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens.

card.name: Obliterating Strike
card.text: Until end of turn, permanents your opponents control lose indestructible and can't gain indestructible. This spell deals 6 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that permanent would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Backstage Preparations
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. Then if {B} was spent to cast this spell, create a tapped Treasure token and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Monument to Fury
card.text: When this enchantment enters and whenever you cast a red spell, this enchantment deals 1 damage to any target and put an awakening counter on this enchantment. As long as Monument to Fury has five or more awakening counters on it, it is a 5/5 Dragon creature with flying.

card.name: Bewitching Lead
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and untap each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it. After this combat phase, there is an additional combat step. Do this only once each turn. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Firstblade Lieutenant
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token. That token gains haste until end of turn and attacks this combat if able. Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, you may exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Freemage's Fiery Temper
card.text: Affinity for Gates (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Gate you control.) This spell deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Flame-kin Commander
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) When this creature enters or dies, it deals X damage divided as you chose among any number of targets, where X is the highest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Rakdos Excrutiator
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Your opponents can't gain life. Damage can't be prevented. Spells and abilities you control can't be countered.

card.name: Shackled Bloodrake
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have it gain flying. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Wojek Avenger
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, this creature deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Welcoming Ringleader
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, create a 1/1 red Devil creature token with "When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target". Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Goldscale Whelp
card.text: Flying, haste This creature can't block. {3}{R}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Mourning Legionnaire
card.text: Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. This ability triggers only once each turn. {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Fiery Comeuppance
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) This spell deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If a permanent dealt damage by this spell would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: All Consuming Rage
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. This spell costs {2} less to cast for each creature sacrificed this way. This spell deals 4 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets.

card.name: Krenko's Ransack
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target land. • Create three 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens. • Discard your hand, then draw two cards and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Nephilim's Impetus
card.text: Choose one. If you control a multicolored permanent, you may choose two instead. • Create a 4/1 red Elemental creature token with trample and haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. • Mill two cards. You may play them this turn.

card.name: Uncontained Hulk
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control and you gain 1 life. When this creature dies, put its counters on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Golgari Rotseer
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {G}. {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Hound Krasis
card.text: Implant {1}{G} ({1}{G}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Vigilance, haste

card.name: Anglershark Krasis
card.text: Implant {2}{G} ({2}{G}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Trample

card.name: Breeding Plant Supervisor
card.text: The first ability you activate each turn that's not a mana ability costs {2} less to activate. Whenever you activate an ability that's not a mana ability for the first time each turn, surveil 1.

card.name: Underdeep Kraul
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) {B}, Sacrifice another creature: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Gate Bulwark
card.text: Defender, vigilance, reach This creature can attack as though it didn't have defender as long as you control a Gate.

card.name: Undercity Ravager
card.text: Trample Swarm 3—{4}{G}{G} ({4}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create three 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Stamp Out
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. If the permanent you don't control is monocolored, the creature you control deals twice that much damage to it instead.

card.name: Return to the Cycle
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard. • Put target face-up exiled card you don't own into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: Swarm's Voracity
card.text: Choose one — • Until end of turn, target creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control and gains trample. • Destroy target creature with flying. • Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens.

card.name: Redo
card.text: Choose one or both — • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. • Return target land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Rotquake
card.text: Destroy target creature or land. Then if {G} was spent to cast this spell, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Monument to Strength
card.text: When this enchantment enters and whenever you cast a green spell, create a 5/5 green Beast creature token with trample and put an awakening counter on this enchantment. As long as Monument to Strength has five or more awakening counters on it, it is a 10/10 Beast creature with trample.

card.name: Perfected Rebirth
card.text: Once during each of your turn, you may cast a creature spell from your graveyard. If you cast a spell this way, that creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter and finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Insatiable Troll
card.text: Trample {2}{G}, Discard this card: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains trample and indestructible until end of turn. Swarm 2—{2}{G} ({2}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Woodwraith Behemoth
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, create a tapped token that's a copy of that creature, except it's a land and has "{T}: Add one mana of any of this card's colors" and loses all other abilities. {1}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice a land: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Rotten Banquet
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Choose one — • Create X 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens, where X is the sacrificed creature's toughness. • Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature, where X is the sacrificed creature's power.

card.name: Deathbloom Mandrake
card.text: Reach Whenever another creature you control dies or one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Swarm 1—{G} ({G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Ochran Stalker
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Swarm 1—{BG}{BG} ({BG}{BG}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Corrosive Experiment
card.text: Implant {2}{G} ({2}{G}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Deathtouch

card.name: Ravenous Sewerscraper
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {2}. This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Dauntless Protector
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, each of up to X target creatures you control gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn, where X is the number of Gates you control.

card.name: Cytoplasmic Membrane
card.text: Choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Ooze Hydra
card.text: Implant {2}{G}{G} ({2}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever this creature enters, deals combat damage to a player, or dies, create two 0/0 green and blue Ooze creature tokens. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Recovering Wilds
card.text: Searched your library and/or graveyard for up to three basic land cards and/or Gate cards, reveal them, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the rest into your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.

card.name: Nephilim's Presence
card.text: Choose one. If you control a multicolored permanent, you may choose two instead. • Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle. • Distribute four +1/+1 counters among up to four target creatures you control.

card.name: Surging Horror
card.text: Haste This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. Swarm 2—{1}{B}{G} ({1}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Inspect the Remains
card.text: Mill five cards. Put a creature or land card from your graveyard into your hand.

card.name: Mangled Rootgiant
card.text: Menace, reach When this creature enters, you gain 3 life and surveil 3.

card.name: Splatterhouse Ravager
card.text: Sacrifice another creature: Draw a card. Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.

card.name: Ring Fire Maniac
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes blocked by a creature, it deals 1 damage to that creature and its controller. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have it gain menace. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Macabre Spectacle
card.text: This spell deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Its controller loses life equal to the excess damage dealt this way.

card.name: Havoc Bringer
card.text: Flying, deathtouch When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target opponent. That player discards a card.

card.name: Gyre Clade Guardian
card.text: Implant {1}{GU}{GU} ({1}{GU}{GU}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Plaxplated Biotitan
card.text: Flying, trample, ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Adaptive Surge
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. • Counter target noncreature spell.

card.name: Scaly Hummerbrood
card.text: Implant {1}{G}{U} ({1}{G}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Flying, trample

card.name: Sunhome Defender
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)

card.name: Skyrender Knight
card.text: Flying Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to target opponent and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Firefist's Indignation
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) This spell deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Firemane Executioner
card.text: Flying, double strike, haste

card.name: Magistrate's Pet
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, scry 1. Preamble {1}{W} ({1}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Rakdos Ragefest
card.text: This spell can't be countered. All creatures have haste, decayed, and attack each combat if able. They lose defender and can't have or gain defender. Whenever a creature dies, each player draws cards and loses life equal to that creature's power.

card.name: Escaped Hellsteed
card.text: Haste Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may return target creature card from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control tapped and attacking and put a +1/+1 counter on both of them. If you do, sacrifice both of them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Replicating Abomination
card.text: Implant {1}{G}{U} ({1}{G}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of target permanent you control.

card.name: Containment Breach
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Search your library for any number of creature cards with total mana value X or less, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle. For each of those creatures, create X tokens that are copies of it.

card.name: On Wings of Fury
card.text: Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) Create X 4/4 white Angel creature tokens with flying and vigilance. Untap all creatures you control. They gain haste until end of turn. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Radiant Champion
card.text: This spell can't be countered. At the beginning of combat on your turn, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put a +1/+1 counter on it. It gains haste until end of turn and attacks each combat this turn if able.

card.name: Juri, Charismatic Performer
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, choose one — • Draw a card and create a Treasure token. • Put two +1/+1 counters on Juri. Then he deals damage equal to the number of counters on him to target opponent.

card.name: Rix Maadi Abomination
card.text: Ward—Discard a card. If a creature attacking or dying causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Devastation in the Streets
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target creature. • Destroy target planeswalker.

card.name: Mindflare
card.text: This spell deals X damage to target player, where X is the number of cards in that player's hand. Then, that player exiles that many cards from the top of their library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play cards exiled this way, and mana of any type can be spent to cast spells among them.

card.name: Gleeful Skinner
card.text: Lifelink If a player would gain life, each of your opponent loses that much life instead. Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have each other creature you control gain lifelink until end of turn. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Unleash // Unlearn
card.text:
Create two 2/1 black and red Elemental Dog creature token with menace, haste, and "This creature can't block." Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.
---
Choose a nonland card name. Search target opponent's graveyard, hand, and library for any number of cards with that name and exile them. Then that player shuffles. This spell deals 1 damage to that player for each card exiled this way.

card.name: Gulistan, Master Biomancer
card.text: Vigilance, ward {1} {X}{G}{U}, {T}: Choose up to one target nontoken creature you control. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary, is a Frog Lizard creature and has base power and toughness 0/0. Put X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Metamorphosed Adapter
card.text: Whenever you activate an ability that's not a mana ability, you may copy it. If you do, you may choose new targets for the copy. Do this only once each turn. If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on that creature instead.

card.name: Force Shaping
card.text: Choose one or both — • Copy target activated or triggered ability from a nonland source. You may chose new targets for the copy. • Counter target activated or triggered ability from a nonland source.

card.name: Skybreaker Biotitan
card.text: Implant {2}{G}{GU}{U} ({2}{G}{GU}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Flying, trample Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw that many cards, then you may cast a spell from your hand with mana value less than or equal to the damage dealt this way without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Thorough Probing
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put up to one land card from among them onto the battlefield tapped, put another card from among them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Transform // Transmute
card.text:
Until end of turn, target creature becomes a green and blue Mutant with base power and toughness 6/6.
---
Choose a non-Aura permanent on the battlefield. Put a +1/+1 counter on target land you control. It becomes a copy of the chosen permanent until end of turn.

card.name: Firemane's Flamberge
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equipped creature gets +1/+0 for each attacking creatures and has flying and first strike. Equip {3}

card.name: Recruitment Campaign
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Then you may put a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your hand onto the battlefield. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Ordruun Marshal
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 red and white Soldier creature tokens. Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, the next spell you cast this turn without muster has muster. (That spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.)

card.name: Incandescent Blessing
card.text: Choose up to one creature or planeswalker you control. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it this turn. This spell deals 3 damage to each creature and planeswalker.

card.name: Diana, Passer of Judgment
card.text: Flying, vigilance At the beginning of each end step, if two or more creatures you control attacked or blocked this turn, Diana deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Volley // Volatile
card.text:
This spell deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker, where X is twice the number of creatures you control.
---
For each permanent type, each player sacrifices a permanent of that type. This spell deals damage to each player equal to the total number of permanents they sacrificed this way.

card.name: Arrester Captain
card.text: This creature has hexproof as long as an opponent controls more creatures than you. This creature can't be blocked as long as an opponent has more life than you. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, draw a card if an opponent has more cards in hand than you.

card.name: Fester
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay 3 life or discard a card. Destroy target artifact, creature, or planeswalker.

card.name: Forsaken Loxodon
card.text: Trample Ward—Pay life equal to this creature's power. This creature's power is equal to the number of creatures you control or the number of creature cards in your graveyard, whichever is greater.

card.name: Gutbloom Host
card.text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.) {BG}, Sacrifice a creature: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fungus Nursery
card.text: When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. {2}, Sacrifice a permanent: Draw a card and you gain 1 life. Swarm 3—{3}{B}{G} ({3}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create three 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Decay Guildmage
card.text: {2}{BG}, {T}: Surveil 2. {4}{B}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. They gain menace until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bitter // Twisted
card.text:
Destroy target creature or planeswalker with mana value 3 or less.
---
Exile each card that was put into an opponent's graveyard this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: The Curtain Falls
card.text: Destroy all artifacts, creatures and planeswalkers.

card.name: Xaren, Rakdos Uncager
card.text: Whenever Xaren or another nontoken creature you control dies, create a 2/1 black and red Elemental Dog creature token with menace, haste, and "This creature can't block." This ability triggers only once each turn. {BR}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Xaren deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Giant Roustabout
card.text: Trample Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it and have it fight target creature you don't control. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Critics Hunter
card.text: Haste Decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) {BR}, Sacrifice a creature: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Wojek Recruitee
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Chaos Guildmage
card.text: {BR}, {T}: Target creature you control gains menace until end of turn. {2}{B}{R}: Target creature you control gains "When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to target opponent and you gain that much life." until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ball // Chain
card.text:
Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
---
Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Praj, Momir Vig's Legacy
card.text: Abilities you activate that target this creature cost {1} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {1}{G}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature. Praj and that creature gain each other's abilities until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Crypsis Clade Guardian
card.text: Implant {1}{G}{U} ({1}{G}{U}, Exile this card from your hand during your turn: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this from exile.) Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, that player mills cards equal to the damage dealt this way. You may put a land card milled this way onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Transfigure
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. Its controller reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a card that shares a card type with the exiled permanent, exiles that card, then they shuffle. They may cast the exiled card without paying its mana cost until their next end step.

card.name: Ooze Bioprocessor
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. When you spend this mana to cast a creature spell or activate an ability, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {2}, {T}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Cerebral Plating
card.text: Creature spells you control and abilities from a creature source you control can't be countered. Nontoken creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter on them.

card.name: Evolution Guildmage
card.text: {1}{GU}, {T}: Create a 0/0 green and blue Ooze creature token. Put a +1/+1 counter on it. {2}{G}{U}: Copy target creature spell, activated ability, or triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a creature spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Live // Learn
card.text:
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.
---
Draw a card for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Boros Rallier
card.text: Flash Muster (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn.) When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Spark Legion
card.text: When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your precombat main phase, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token. It gains lifelink and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Mileva of the Tenth
card.text: Vigilance, haste As long as Mileva is blocking or being blocked, prevent all damage that would be dealt to other creatures you control.

card.name: Righteous Smite
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to any other target.

card.name: War Guildmage
card.text: {1}{RW}, {T}: Create a 1/1 red and white Soldier creature token. {3}{R}{W}: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 for each other creature you control and gains double strike until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Loud // Proud
card.text:
Up to two target creatures can't block this turn.
---
Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Flame-kin Summoner
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Azorius Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {W} or {U}. {3}{W}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You draw two cards and gain 2 life.

card.name: Boros Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {2}{R}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create two 1/1 red and white Soldier creature tokens. Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Simic Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {G}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Rakdos Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {B} or {R}. {B}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Each player discards a card. Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Golgari Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {B} or {G}. {3}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Mill three cards. You may return a creature card and/or a land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Opal Medallion
card.text: Multicolored spells you cast cost {W}, {U}, {B}, {R} or {G} (or {1}) less to cast.

card.name: Ancient Monoliths
card.text: Multicolored spells you control can't be countered. Multicolored permanents you control have hexproof from monocolored. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, copy that spell. You may chose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Embersoul Edge
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+1. {5}, Sacrifice equipped creature: This Equipment deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target. Activate only as a sorcery. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Ageless Scholar
card.text: Ageless Scholar is all colors. When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card or Gate card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Gatekeeper Golem
card.text: Affinity for Gates (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Gate you control.) Trample Whenever a Gate you control enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Ravnican Omnicompass
card.text: Ravnican Omnicompass is all colors. Gates you control enter untapped. You may look at the top card of your library any time. You may play Gate cards from the top of your library.

card.name: Decrepit Gargoyle
card.text: When this creature enters, up to one target player mills two cards. This creature gets +3/+0 and has flying as long as you have exiled two or more cards with it. {2}, {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Blood Crypt
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Azorius Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Boros Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Breeding Pool
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Golgari Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Hallowed Fountain
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Overgrown Tomb
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Rakdos Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Plaza's Omenpath
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {5}, {T}: Create a 2/2 Citizen creature token that's all colors.

card.name: Sacred Foundry
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Simic Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Erstwhile Awakener
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Add two mana in any combination of colors. {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. {3}{B}{B}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Zafen, Scheming Necromancer
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a creature. If one or more creature tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus that many 2/1 black Skeleton creature tokens are created instead. {T}, Sacrifice X other creatures: Zafen deals X damage to any target and you gain X life.

card.name: Voracious Deathstinger
card.text: Trample, indestructible Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, each player sacrifices a creature. You gain life equal to the total toughness of creatures sacrificed. Swarm X—{X}{BG}{BG} ({X}{BG}{BG}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create X 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Corpse-Pit Goliath
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature or another nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token for each +1/+1 counters on it. {BG}, Sacrifice a creature: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Lothran, the Glouton
card.text: Menace Whenever Lothran attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, he gains indestructible until end of turn. Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on Lothran.

card.name: Festering Mass
card.text: Attacking creatures you control have deathtouch and lifelink. Each permanent card in your graveyard has "Swarm 2—{2}{BG}{BG}." ({2}{BG}{BG}, Exile a creature card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens.)

card.name: Putrefied Tutor
card.text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your graveyard, then shuffle. You may return a card from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Putrefied Tutor.

card.name: Remains // Remake
card.text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. You draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power, then you gain life equal to its toughness.
---
Exile all graveyards. Create X 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens, each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the number of permanent cards exiled this way.

card.name: 1/1 Devil RNF
card.text: When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Rakdos Trailblazer
card.text: Trample Performance — Whenever this creature attacks, you may put two +1/+1 counters on it. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Infested Maneater
card.text: Deathtouch, reach Swarm 2—{3}{G} ({3}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens. Swarm only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Accelerated Growth
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. If {U} was spent to cast this spell, put a card from among them into your hand. Otherwise, reveal a permanent card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Lamiel, Deathsprout Cultivator
card.text: Whenever one or more nontoken cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere or one or more cards leave your graveyard, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn. {1}{B}{G}, Discard a permanent card: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Amalgamate
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Destroy target permanent. Add X mana in any combination of colors, where X is that permanent's mana value.

card.name: 2/1 Elemental Dog RNF
card.text: Menace, haste This creature can't block.

card.name: Treasure RNF
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: 2/2 Citizen RNF
card.text: This creature is all colors.

card.name: Coerced Participation
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step if it has mana value 3 or less.

card.name: 4/4 Sphinx RNF
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: 4/4 Angel RNF
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Hull Clade Guardian
Cull
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Choose one — • Destroy target creature. • Draw two cards.

card.name: 6/6 Demon RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: 2/2 Spirit RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: 4/1 Nephilim Elemental RNF
card.text: Trample, haste

card.name: Azorius Lawbringer
card.text: Flying, vigilance Other creatures you control get +1/+0. Creatures you don't control get -1/-0. Preamble {5}{W}{W} ({5}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Azorius Lawmage
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you haven't cast a spell from your hand this turn, untap up to one target artifact or creature you control. {1}{U}, {T}: Tap target artifact or creature.

card.name: Safeguard
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if a player has cast a spell from anywhere other than their hand this turn. You gain hexproof until end of turn. Creatures you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Preemptive Measures
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you've cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand this turn, it also gains first strike and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Righteous Uprising
card.text: Create X 1/1 white Human creature tokens, where X is the number of Gates you control.

card.name: Ready the Arresters
card.text: Create two 1/1 white and blue Soldier creature tokens. Preamble {3}{W} ({3}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Fierce Champion
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) During your turn, this creature has first strike. Otherwise, it has lifelink.

card.name: Zealous Arrester
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. Preamble {2}{W} ({2}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Apprehend the Guilty
card.text: Tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on each of them. Preamble {3}{U} ({3}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Detain Wisdom
card.text: Each player mills four cards. You may put a card you milled this way into your hand. Then if {W} was spent to cast this spell, exile each opponent's graveyard.

card.name: Enfeebling Shackles
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {2}, {T}: Target creature can't attack or block until your next turn. Preamble {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Inquire
card.text: Draw a card. Preamble {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Jelenn Grand Elocutor
card.text: Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {2} less to cast. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Precognition Serum
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put three of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Preamble {4}{U}{U} ({4}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Denied // Dismissed
card.text:
Target player can't cast spells this turn.
---
Return target spell or nonland permanent an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Order Guildmage
card.text: {WU}, {T}: Target creature you control gains flying until end of turn. {2}{W}{U}: You draw a card and gain 1 life.

card.name: Pursuit // Purification
card.text:
Create two 1/1 white and blue Thopter artifact creature tokens with flying.
---
Exile any number of target creatures, then return them tapped under their owner's control. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control and a stun counter on each creature you don't control.

card.name: Azorius Purifier
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Whenever an opponent casts a spell or activates an ability of a nonland permanent or card that shares a name with a card exiled with this creature, you draw a card.

card.name: Binding Decree
card.text: Abilities of nonland permanents and cards your opponents activate cost {2} more to activate. Activated abilities of nonland permanents and cards you control cost {2} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana.

card.name: Decipher the Chronology
card.text: Search your library and/or graveyard for a nonland card with mana value 3 or less, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle. Exile Decipher the Chronology.

card.name: Sarvis, High Justicar
card.text: Each player can't cast more than one spell from their hand each turn. Each nonland card in your hand has preamble. The preamble cost is equal to {2} plus its mana cost. (Exile a nonland card from your hand and pay its preamble cost: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast it from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Forecaster Arbitrator
card.text: Your opponents can't cast spells or activate abilities during your turn. At the beginning of your end step, if you haven't cast a spell from your hand this turn, look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other on the bottom of your library.

card.name: Incarcerate
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, exile target spell or nonland permanent an opponent controls. Spells with the same name as the exiled card cost {2} more to cast. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to its owner's hand.

card.name: Inquisitive Guardmage
card.text: Flying, lifelink When this creature enters, draw a card. Preamble {2}{W}{U} ({2}{W}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Judgment of Balance
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Return all nonland permanents to their owners' hands. Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then each player who does creates a 4/4 white and blue Sphinx creature token with flying and vigilance, draws seven cards and gains 7 life.

card.name: Lavinia, the Just
card.text: Players can only declare one attacker and one blocker each turn. Whenever a player casts a spell from anywhere other than their hand or activates an ability from anywhere other than the battlefield, you may draw a card.

card.name: Octave, Deputy of Discipline
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, create a 1/1 white and blue Thopter artifact creature token with flying. If that spell was cast from anywhere other than your hand, create two of those tokens instead. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Peruse the Law
card.text: Choose one. If this spell was cast from exile, you may choose both instead. • You draw a card and gain 3 life. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Preamble {2}{W}{U} ({2}{W}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. You may cast this from exile. Preamble only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Unending Tirade
card.text: Counter target spell. Its controller mills X cards and you gain X life.

card.name: Seal of Censure
card.text: Tap all creatures. They lose all their abilities until end of turn. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.

card.name: Sphinx Lawbinder
card.text: Flying, vigilance You have hexproof.

card.name: 2/2 Drake RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: Deadly Spore Storm
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. • All creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Arbiter of Law
card.text: Flying, vigilance Your opponents can't cast creature spells. You may cast creature spells without paying their mana cost.

card.name: 1/1 Thopter RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: Gateway Plaza
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Esoteric Signet
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {1}, {T}: Add two mana of different colors. {3}, {T}: Add four mana of different colors.

card.name: 5/5 Beast RNF
card.text: Trample

card.name: Tajic Emblem RNF
card.text: Creatures you control have double strike, lifelink, trample, indestructible and haste.

card.name: Vannifar Emblem RNF
card.text: Whenever a permanent you control becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, create a token that's a copy of it.
